title: Korean-Style Quinoa Pilaf
description: A flavorful and nutritious Korean-inspired pilaf made with quinoa, vegetables, and a sweet and spicy sauce.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked pilaf and stir to combine with the vegetables.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, gochujang, and brown sugar.
Pour the sauce over the pilaf mixture and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the chopped green onions.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
Cook the quinoa according to package instructions and serve alongside the pilaf.
